original_prompt:
뭔데 

Enforcement state 
Name
ID
Security insights 
Constraint type
Policy source 
Actions
 Inactive    Allowed AWS accounts that can be configured for workload identity federation in Cloud IAM    iam.managed.workloadIdentityPoolAwsAccounts        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Allowed external Identity Providers for workloads in Cloud IAM    iam.managed.workloadIdentityPoolProviders        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Allowed VLAN Attachment encryption settings    compute.managed.allowedVlanAttachmentEncryption        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Active    Block Compute Engine Preview Features    compute.managed.blockPreviewFeatures        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Block project SSH keys    dataflow.managed.blockProjectSshKeys        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Block Project-wide SSH Keys    compute.managed.blockProjectSshKeys        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Active    Block service account API key bindings    iam.managed.disableServiceAccountApiKeyCreation        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Denied editions for Spanner instances    spanner.managed.restrictCloudSpannerEditions        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable creation of Compute Engine instances that use the deprecated container startup agent (konlet).    compute.managed.disableVmsWithContainerStartupAgent        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Active    Disable custom mcp server connector for gemini enterprise    discoveryengine.managed.disableCustomMcpServerConnector        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable Guest Attributes of Compute Engine metadata    compute.managed.disableGuestAttributesAccess        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable Kafka Connect Cluster Create And Update    managedkafka.managed.disableKafkaConnectClusterCreateAndUpdate        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable MongoDB compatible API data access for Firestore databases    firestore.managed.disableMongodbCompatibleDataAccessMode        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable Non-FIPS Compliant Machine Types    compute.managed.disableNonFIPSMachineTypes        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable public IPs    dataflow.managed.disableUsePublicIps        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable service account creation    iam.managed.disableServiceAccountCreation        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable service account key creation    iam.managed.disableServiceAccountKeyCreation        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable service account key upload    iam.managed.disableServiceAccountKeyUpload        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable VM Nested Virtualization    compute.managed.disableNestedVirtualization        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disable VM serial port logging to Stackdriver    compute.managed.disableSerialPortLogging        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disables Subscription Single Message Transforms (SMTs)    pubsub.managed.disableSubscriptionMessageTransforms        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disables Topic Single Message Transforms (SMTs)    pubsub.managed.disableTopicMessageTransforms        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Disallow using the default Compute Engine service account as the node pool service account.    container.managed.disallowDefaultComputeServiceAccount        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Active    Enable Autopilot privileged admission control    container.managed.autopilotPrivilegedAdmission        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Prevent privileged basic roles for default service accounts    iam.managed.preventPrivilegedBasicRolesForDefaultServiceAccounts        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require disabling the insecure kubelet read-only port in GKE clusters    container.managed.disableInsecureKubeletReadOnlyPort        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling Binary Authorization for GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableBinaryAuthorization        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling Google Groups for RBAC in GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableGoogleGroupsRBAC        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling network policy enforcement in GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableNetworkPolicy        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling private nodes in GKE clusters.    container.managed.enablePrivateNodes        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling Security Bulletin Notifications in GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableSecurityBulletinNotifications        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling self-managed secrets Encryption in GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableSecretsEncryption        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling Shielded Nodes in GKE clusters    container.managed.enableShieldedNodes        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require enabling Workload Identity Federation for GKE.    container.managed.enableWorkloadIdentityFederation        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require IAM invoker check for Cloud Run services    run.managed.requireInvokerIam        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require OS Config    compute.managed.requireOsConfig        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require OS Login    compute.managed.requireOsLogin        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require that Attribute-Based Access Control is disabled    container.managed.disableABAC        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require that client certificate authentication is disabled    container.managed.disableLegacyClientCertificateIssuance        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require that Cloud Logging is enabled in GKE clusters    container.managed.enableCloudLogging        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require that the DenyServiceExternalIPs admission controller is enabled    container.managed.denyServiceExternalIPs        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Require using only the DNS-based endpoint to access GKE clusters.    container.managed.enableControlPlaneDNSOnlyAccess        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Requires disabling RBAC bindings to system identities in GKE clusters.    container.managed.disableRBACSystemBindings        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict allowed policy members in IAM allow policies    iam.managed.allowedPolicyMembers        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict Authorized Networks on Cloud SQL instances    sql.managed.restrictAuthorizedNetworks        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict contact domains    essentialcontacts.managed.allowedContactDomains        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict enabling VM serial port access metadata    compute.managed.disableSerialPortAccess        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict External IPs For VM instances    compute.managed.vmExternalIpAccess        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict Non-Confidential Computing    compute.managed.restrictNonConfidentialComputing        Managed    Inherit parent's policy        
 Inactive    Restrict Public IP access on Cloud SQL instances    sql.managed.restrictPublicIp
